name: SimpleX
description: SimpleX channel plugin for OpenClaw using the official Node runtime

uiHints.label: SimpleX
uiHints.help: Connect OpenClaw to SimpleX through the official Node runtime. Reachability starts from SimpleX invite or address links, while OpenClaw still applies pairing, allowlists, and group policy.

defaultAccount.label: Default Account
defaultAccount.help: Account id OpenClaw should use when a command does not specify a SimpleX account.

accounts.label: Additional Accounts
accounts.help: Named SimpleX account overrides keyed by account id.

name.label: Account Name
name.help: Optional friendly label for this SimpleX runtime account.

accounts.*.name.label: Account Name
accounts.*.name.help: Optional friendly label for this SimpleX runtime account.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Disable an account without deleting its SimpleX configuration.

accounts.*.enabled.label: Enabled
accounts.*.enabled.help: Disable an account without deleting its SimpleX configuration.

mediaMaxMb.label: Max Media Size (MB)
mediaMaxMb.help: Optional media size cap for files sent through this SimpleX account.

accounts.*.mediaMaxMb.label: Max Media Size (MB)
accounts.*.mediaMaxMb.help: Optional media size cap for files sent through this SimpleX account.

actions.label: Actions
actions.help: Optional per-account action toggles for SimpleX message features.

accounts.*.actions.label: Actions
accounts.*.actions.help: Optional per-account action toggles for SimpleX message features.

actions.reactions.label: Enable Reactions
actions.reactions.help: Allow the agent to add or remove emoji reactions through the SimpleX runtime.

accounts.*.actions.reactions.label: Enable Reactions
accounts.*.actions.reactions.help: Allow the agent to add or remove emoji reactions through the SimpleX runtime.

actions.polls.label: Enable Polls
actions.polls.help: Allow the agent to send OpenClaw poll prompts into SimpleX chats.

accounts.*.actions.polls.label: Enable Polls
accounts.*.actions.polls.help: Allow the agent to send OpenClaw poll prompts into SimpleX chats.

reactionLevel.label: Reaction Level
reactionLevel.help: Controls agent reaction behavior. Use "minimal" for restrained reactions, "extensive" for more expressive use, "ack" for non-agent acknowledgements only, and "off" to disable reactions entirely.

accounts.*.reactionLevel.label: Reaction Level
accounts.*.reactionLevel.help: Controls agent reaction behavior. Use "minimal" for restrained reactions, "extensive" for more expressive use, "ack" for non-agent acknowledgements only, and "off" to disable reactions entirely.

dmPolicy.label: DM Policy
dmPolicy.help: Direct-message access policy. "pairing" is the safest default; "open" should stay paired with a deliberate allowFrom policy.

accounts.*.dmPolicy.label: DM Policy
accounts.*.dmPolicy.help: Direct-message access policy. "pairing" is the safest default; "open" should stay paired with a deliberate allowFrom policy.

dmHistoryLimit.label: DM History Limit
dmHistoryLimit.help: Optional direct-message transcript window to retain for reply context.

accounts.*.dmHistoryLimit.label: DM History Limit
accounts.*.dmHistoryLimit.help: Optional direct-message transcript window to retain for reply context.

allowFrom.label: DM Allowlist
allowFrom.help: Allowed SimpleX senders for direct messages. Use ["*"] only when you intentionally want broad DM reachability.

accounts.*.allowFrom.label: DM Allowlist
accounts.*.allowFrom.help: Allowed SimpleX senders for direct messages. Use ["*"] only when you intentionally want broad DM reachability.

blockStreaming.label: Block Streaming Replies
blockStreaming.help: Send streaming replies in coalesced blocks instead of incremental partial chunks.

accounts.*.blockStreaming.label: Block Streaming Replies
accounts.*.blockStreaming.help: Send streaming replies in coalesced blocks instead of incremental partial chunks.

blockStreamingCoalesce.label: Streaming Coalesce
blockStreamingCoalesce.help: Tune how block-mode streaming batches partial output before it is emitted.

accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.label: Streaming Coalesce
accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.help: Tune how block-mode streaming batches partial output before it is emitted.

blockStreamingCoalesce.minChars.label: Min Coalesce Chars
blockStreamingCoalesce.minChars.help: Minimum buffered characters before an intermediate block update is sent.

accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.minCha.label: Min Coalesce Chars
accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.minCha.help: Minimum buffered characters before an intermediate block update is sent.

blockStreamingCoalesce.maxChars.label: Max Coalesce Chars
blockStreamingCoalesce.maxChars.help: Maximum buffered characters before a block update is forced.

accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.maxCha.label: Max Coalesce Chars
accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.maxCha.help: Maximum buffered characters before a block update is forced.

blockStreamingCoalesce.idleMs.label: Coalesce Idle Delay (ms)
blockStreamingCoalesce.idleMs.help: Maximum idle delay before a partially buffered block reply is flushed.

accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.idleMs.label: Coalesce Idle Delay (ms)
accounts.*.blockStreamingCoalesce.idleMs.help: Maximum idle delay before a partially buffered block reply is flushed.

groupPolicy.label: Group Policy
groupPolicy.help: Group-message access policy. Keep "allowlist" unless you intentionally want broader group reachability.

accounts.*.groupPolicy.label: Group Policy
accounts.*.groupPolicy.help: Group-message access policy. Keep "allowlist" unless you intentionally want broader group reachability.

groupAllowFrom.label: Group Allowlist
groupAllowFrom.help: Allowed SimpleX senders for groups when groupPolicy is allowlist.

accounts.*.groupAllowFrom.label: Group Allowlist
accounts.*.groupAllowFrom.help: Allowed SimpleX senders for groups when groupPolicy is allowlist.

groups.label: Group Overrides
groups.help: Optional per-group overrides for mention and tool policy behavior.

accounts.*.groups.label: Group Overrides
accounts.*.groups.help: Optional per-group overrides for mention and tool policy behavior.

groups.*.requireMention.label: Require Mention
groups.*.requireMention.help: Require an explicit mention before the bot responds in that group.

accounts.*.groups.*.requireMention.label: Require Mention
accounts.*.groups.*.requireMention.help: Require an explicit mention before the bot responds in that group.

groups.*.tools.label: Tool Policy
groups.*.tools.help: Optional per-group tool policy override for this SimpleX group.

accounts.*.groups.*.tools.label: Tool Policy
accounts.*.groups.*.tools.help: Optional per-group tool policy override for this SimpleX group.

connection.label: Connection
connection.help: Runtime settings for the official SimpleX Node runtime.

accounts.*.connection.label: Connection
accounts.*.connection.help: Runtime settings for the official SimpleX Node runtime.

connection.dbFilePrefix.label: Node DB File Prefix
connection.dbFilePrefix.help: SQLite database file prefix for the SimpleX Node runtime. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/simplex/openclaw-simplex.

accounts.*.connection.dbFilePrefix.label: Node DB File Prefix
accounts.*.connection.dbFilePrefix.help: SQLite database file prefix for the SimpleX Node runtime. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/simplex/openclaw-simplex.

connection.displayName.label: SimpleX Profile Name
connection.displayName.help: Display name used when the Node runtime creates its SimpleX profile.

accounts.*.connection.displayName.label: SimpleX Profile Name
accounts.*.connection.displayName.help: Display name used when the Node runtime creates its SimpleX profile.

connection.fullName.label: SimpleX Full Name
connection.fullName.help: Full name used when the Node runtime creates its SimpleX profile.

accounts.*.connection.fullName.label: SimpleX Full Name
accounts.*.connection.fullName.help: Full name used when the Node runtime creates its SimpleX profile.

connection.migrationConfirmation.label: DB Migration Mode
connection.migrationConfirmation.help: SimpleX database migration confirmation mode for the Node runtime.

accounts.*.connection.migrationConfirmat.label: DB Migration Mode
accounts.*.connection.migrationConfirmat.help: SimpleX database migration confirmation mode for the Node runtime.

connection.autoAcceptFiles.label: Auto Accept Files
connection.autoAcceptFiles.help: Automatically accept incoming file transfers from the SimpleX runtime.

accounts.*.connection.autoAcceptFiles.label: Auto Accept Files
accounts.*.connection.autoAcceptFiles.help: Automatically accept incoming file transfers from the SimpleX runtime.

openclaw-simplex.label: SimpleX
openclaw-simplex.description: SimpleX Chat through the official Node runtime.
